page_content:
Formerly: HIST319A.

HIST384 Global History of Capitalism (3 Credits)

Surveys the development of capitalism since the 1500s from a global perspective, focusing on Asia, Africa, and Latin America. Topics include markets, entrepreneurship, commodity flows, labor migration, conflicts between states and empires, and environmental impacts. Engagement with primary sources and key debates, tracking changing ideas and interpretations of capitalism over time.

Credit Only Granted for. HIST329L or HIST384.
